```dockerfile
# Thu, 19 Sep 2024 17:24:19 GMT
COPY /rootfs/ / # buildkit
# Thu, 19 Sep 2024 17:24:19 GMT
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
# Thu, 19 Sep 2024 23:46:25 GMT
ARG version=11.0.24.8-1
# Thu, 19 Sep 2024 23:46:25 GMT
